content: Hi, I'm thinking of renovating my home in Los Angeles. I've got a big backyard and I want to make the most of it. I'm a wedding planner, so I'm always looking for new ideas and inspiration.
That sounds like a great project! What kind of renovations are you thinking of doing? And congratulations on being a wedding planner, that's a fun and creative job!

Well, I was thinking of putting in a outdoor kitchen and dining area. I love entertaining and hosting dinner parties, and this would be a great way to do that. And maybe a little garden, I've got a green thumb and I love gardening.

An outdoor kitchen and dining area would be amazing! And a garden is a great idea, gardening can be very therapeutic. Have you considered what kind of plants you'll put in the garden? You mentioned you have a green thumb, what's your favorite type of plant to work with?

Yeah, I love working with flowers. I've got a whole collection of them in my backyard. But for the new garden, I think I'll stick to more low-maintenance plants. Maybe some succulents and herbs. I've also been getting into knitting, so I might try to make some blankets or pillows to decorate the outdoor space.
Flowers are beautiful! And succulents and herbs are great choices for a low-maintenance garden. Knitting is a great hobby, have you made anything recently?

Actually, I've been working on a few projects. I just finished a blanket for my niece's birthday, and I'm thinking of making a few scarves for my friends. I've also been getting into surfing, so I might try to make some surf-inspired decorations for the outdoor space.
That sounds like a lot of fun! Surfing is a great way to stay active and enjoy the outdoors. And surf-inspired decorations will be a great way to add some personality to the space.

Definitely. I'm thinking of having a big party to celebrate the renovation, maybe a summer solstice party. I'll invite all my friends and family, and we can have a big barbecue and enjoy the new outdoor space.
That sounds like a great idea! A summer solstice party is a perfect way to celebrate the renovation and the start of summer. And a barbecue is always a great way to bring people together.

Yeah, I'm looking forward to it. I've also been working on an online course, so I might try to use the new outdoor space as a filming location. Maybe I can even do some travel blogging and share some of my favorite destinations with my students.

That's a great idea! Using the outdoor space as a filming location will be a great way to add some visual interest to your course. And travel blogging is a great way to share your experiences and inspire others.

Definitely. I'm thinking of starting the course in September, so I've got a few months to get everything ready. I'm excited to share my knowledge and experience with my students, and I think the new outdoor space will be a great asset for the course.
That's great! You're a very motivated and creative person, Dana. I'm sure your course will be a success and your students will love the new outdoor space.
Thanks, I'm looking forward to it. I'll be sure to share some photos of the renovation and the course with you when it's all done.
I'd love to see them! You're a very talented and inspiring person, Dana. I'm sure you'll do great things with your course and your wedding planning business.
